other_observers: Cole Wild, Doug Kibbe, many others; Brad Biggerstaff originally found this bird about 9 am on Aug 25th. Many others observed it independently.
specific_location: North end thicket at Dixon Reservoir (Pine Ridge Natural Area)
description: Small, warbler sized bird with grayish back and hood, olive-green tail, rump and wings with two broad white wing-bars, pale gray throat, breast and belly with bright yellow sides; bright yellow spectacles; white iris; small, stubby black bill. Black legs and feet.Behaviors: slow flitting in shrubs and small treesCall: "chup vireeeooo chup" and variationsPlumage: adult
